vajrayana.title: diamond vehicle
vajrayana.tooltip: Vajrayana uses mandalas as ritual and contemplative maps of awakened space; this preset stays stylized, but its core frame is historically grounded.
vajrayana.summary: Tantric Buddhist mandala as an initiatory palace of awakened mind, used in visualization, consecration, and deity practice.
vajrayana.hidden: Union of method and wisdom, where force is clarified into compassion and lucid awareness.
vajrayana.caution: This generator is inspired by the tradition, not a strict iconographic reconstruction of a specific tantric mandala.

theravada.title: elder path
theravada.tooltip: Theravada is centered on ethics, meditation, and insight rather than a canonical mandala system, so this preset is intentionally minimalist and interpretive.
theravada.summary: Ascetic contemplative geometry reduced toward discipline, breath, and clear seeing rather than a historically fixed Theravada mandala canon.
theravada.hidden: Renunciation, ethical balance, and insight into impermanence through restraint.
theravada.caution: Theravada is not typically framed through mandala liturgy in the Vajrayana or Shingon sense; this is a design interpretation.

zen.title: empty mirror
zen.tooltip: Zen is represented here through ensō-like reduction: one gesture, one field, less symbolic density, more direct presence.
zen.summary: Minimal structure echoing ensō logic: one gesture, one field, and as little excess as possible.
zen.hidden: Directness, silence, and the fertile void behind appearances.
zen.caution: Zen does not operate through a single canonical mandala program; this preset leans on ensō aesthetics and meditative minimalism.

tibetan.title: sand palace
tibetan.tooltip: Tibetan sand mandalas build dense sacred palaces with layered gates and directional order, then dissolve them to teach impermanence.
tibetan.summary: Ritual cosmogram of the deity realm, dense with gates, layers, and consecrated space.
tibetan.hidden: Impermanence inside splendor: complexity is assembled with care, then released back into emptiness.
tibetan.caution: This preset borrows the layered logic of Tibetan mandala art, but does not reproduce a named liturgical mandala exactly.

shingon.title: true word matrix
shingon.tooltip: Shingon centers the Two Realms mandalas, where Mahavairocana, mantra, compassion, and wisdom are ordered into a formal esoteric cosmos.
shingon.summary: Esoteric Japanese field of mantra, lotus unfolding, and encoded correspondences, especially through the Womb and Diamond Realms.
shingon.hidden: Sound becoming form: sacred speech crystallized into ordered radiance.
shingon.caution: The visual language is inspired by Shingon correspondences, but simplified for a generative tool.

fractal.title: recursive gnosis
fractal.tooltip: Fractal mode is a contemporary contemplative abstraction: self-similarity, recursion, and scale mirroring rather than a historical ritual tradition.
fractal.summary: Self-similar triangle growth where each scale mirrors the whole.
fractal.hidden: As above, so below: the pattern of mind repeats through every layer.
fractal.caution: This is a modern symbolic mode, not a historical sacred tradition.

slavic.title: solar wheel
slavic.tooltip: Slavic mode draws from solar, seasonal, and protective motifs associated with modern Rodnovery; claims of one stable ancient kolovrat meaning are debated, so this preset is marked reconstructive.
slavic.summary: Solar-wheel geometry tied to season, hearth, and protection, framed through modern reconstructions of Slavic sacred motifs.
slavic.hidden: Cycle, ancestry, and life-force moving through remembered and re-imagined sacred order.
slavic.caution: Kolovrat symbolism is widely used in modern Slavic Native Faith, but a uniform ancient pan-Slavic reading is not securely documented.

runic.title: futhark seal
runic.tooltip: Runic mode is based on Elder Futhark letterforms and later esoteric readings; runes are historical inscriptions first, while their use here as radial protective geometry is a modern interpretation.
runic.summary: Rune-like angular structure focused on inscription, omen, and carved protection, derived from Elder Futhark forms.
runic.hidden: Fate read as pattern: the mark becomes a compact for memory, boundary, and will.
runic.caution: Elder Futhark is a historical writing system, not a historical mandala tradition; this preset deliberately adapts runic forms into symbolic geometry.

custom.title: open sigil field
custom.tooltip: Custom mode drops historical constraints and lets you combine palettes, glyphs, and sacred geometry into a personal symbolic field.
custom.summary: Free synthesis mode where symbols from multiple streams are fused into one artifact.
custom.hidden: Personal myth-making: meaning is assembled rather than inherited.
custom.caution: This mode is intentionally ahistorical and combinatory.

samsara.meaning: purple-gold current of transmutation, royalty, and awakened abundance

fire.meaning: ritual heat, purification, and active deity force

ice.meaning: clarity, stillness, and the cool mirror of emptiness

slavic.meaning: solar blood-memory, harvest gold, linen white, and hearth protection

rune.meaning: moon-metal memory, carved omen, and ancestral warding

none.meaning: no external icon, so the field speaks through pure geometry

eye.meaning: the witness principle opens inner sight

dharmachakra.meaning: the wheel marks teaching and lawful motion

deer.meaning: gentleness and listening soften the field

elephant.meaning: steady power and memory root the design

stupa.meaning: relic-mind and sacred ascent stabilize the axis

tree.meaning: vertical growth links worlds through one trunk

moon.meaning: reflection and rhythm tune the image to cycles

algiz.caution: Protective meanings are common in modern esoteric rune reading; historical rune use was broader and context-dependent.

othala.meaning: inheritance and homeland are enclosed and guarded
othala.caution: Later esoteric readings often emphasize heritage and estate; early rune evidence is less doctrinal than modern occult summaries imply.

kolovrat.meaning: the sun-wheel sets the field into living rotation
kolovrat.caution: Used widely in modern Rodnovery, but its exact ancient uniform meaning is debated.

runicStar.meaning: directional force radiates as a warding compass

worldTree.meaning: ancestral axis ties underworld, earth, and sky

spiral.meaning: meaning coils inward and outward as initiation

radial.meaning: meaning radiates from the center into the world

hidden.meaning: meaning remains veiled, active below visibility

glitch.meaning: meaning is fractured so deeper strata leak through the signal
